items.title: Slate’s Gray $25,000 Truck Just Got a Crayola Makeover
items.summary: The Bezos-backed automaker building America’s cheapest electric truck is teaming up with the crayon company in a bid to brighten its rides. Make ours Razzmatazz.

items.title: New York is the first US state to ban smart glasses in all its courthouses
items.summary: New York has banned smart glasses in all 1,240 state, county, city, town and village courts.
